title: Baroque Works Agents Flee
description: On pages 5–8, baroque works agents flee as vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus.
scene: Baroque Works Agents Flee. Vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.
